title: Duplicate executions from schedule trigger
symptom: The schedule trigger executes twice at the same time, causing duplicate costs with other providers.
applies_when: Configured to run at specific hours
not_this_if: Schedule node is set to run without specific hour constraints
root_cause: The issue arises when the schedule node is configured to run at both specific hours and a recurring interval, leading to multiple triggers firing at the same time.
fix_steps: Set a custom schedule using the syntax '*4' to specify the interval
agent_instruction: Adjust the schedule node to use a custom schedule syntax to prevent duplicate executions.
